item.title: Pharma Marketing Campaigns
item.description:
• Summary: Several new pharmaceutical marketing campaigns have launched. ImmunityBio is establishing new protocols for claims related to its cancer drug. Insulet is promoting its Omnipod insulin delivery system with a Type 2 diabetes representation campaign tied to a TV show revival. Eli Lilly is running a 150th-anniversary campaign targeting audiences at the Final Four. Additionally, agency VML Health is urging marketers to shift focus from lifespan to "joyspan," emphasizing evolving patient goals.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma, Fierce Pharma, Fierce Pharma, Fierce Pharma

item.title: Hims & Hers Data Breach
item.description:
• Summary: Hims & Hers experienced a data breach due to social engineering attacks, compromising sensitive customer information. This incident highlights cybersecurity vulnerabilities in digital health platforms and raises concerns about data protection in telehealth services.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive
